title.zh: 基于 Scylla 的红队渗透代理池
title.en: Red Team Penetration Proxy Pool Based on Scylla

description.zh: 使用 Scylla 搭建代理池，支持手工 Burp 渗透同时后台 Xray 扫描。
description.en: Use Scylla to build proxy pool, supporting manual Burp penetration while Xray scans in background.

codeBlocks.code:
cd scylla-1.1.7
python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
export http_proxy="http://127.0.0.1:8082"
export https_proxy="http://127.0.0.1:8082"
python3 -m scylla

content.zh: Scylla 启动成功，监听端口 8899
content.en: Scylla started successfully, listening on port 8899

content.zh: 验证代理池是否正常工作

caption.zh: 对比真实 IP 和代理 IP
caption.en: Compare real IP and proxy IP

content.zh: 代理池搭建完成，可用于 Burp 渗透和 Xray 扫描的 IP 轮换。
content.en: Proxy pool setup complete, can be used for Burp penetration and Xray scanning IP rotation.
